data.title: EASA and CAA approve Butler/Avcon non-halon aircraft fire extinguishers, boosting aviation safety.
data.description: EASA and CAA recently approved the Supplemental Type Certificate (STC) for Avcon's non-halon replacement portable fire extinguisher solution. This significant development was made public on December 4, 2025, by Butler National Corporation (OTCQX: BUKS), a prominent player in the aviation industry. The STC authorization from the European Aviation Safety Agency (EASA) and the Civil Aviation Authority (CAA) signifies a major milestone in enhancing safety measures within aircraft. This innovation is poised to revolutionize the market as it addresses fire safety concerns while aligning with environmental sustainability goals by offering a non-halon alternative. Butler National Corporation's focus on aircraft modification, maintenance, repair, and overhaul (MRO) underscores its commitment to advancing industry standards. The industry eagerly anticipates the widespread adoption of this pioneering fire extinguisher solution, indicating a positive shift towards more efficient and eco-friendly aviation practices.

data.title: Unox starts production at $20M U.S. facility in Denver, NC, making ovens for North American foodservice operators.
data.description: Unox has commenced operations at its inaugural U.S. plant situated in Denver, North Carolina, marking a significant milestone in the company's expansion efforts. With a substantial investment totaling $20 million, the facility is dedicated to producing top-of-the-line ovens tailored specifically for foodservice providers across North America.

data.title: CFTC approves spot crypto trading on US exchanges to boost activity and safety, discouraging offshore ones. Acting Chair Pham supports.
data.description: Caroline Pham, the Acting Chair of the CFTC, emphasized the decision's aim to boost trading within US exchanges over offshore alternatives lacking fundamental protections.
Aspo Plc to repurchase shares on 4.12.2025.

data.title: Info-Tech Research Group ranks top network monitoring solutions for 2025 based on user reviews for visibility & resilience.
data.description: Based on end-user feedback, the 2025 Network Monitoring Data Quadrant Report by Info-Tech Research Group showcases the leading solutions that offer tangible benefits including real-time visibility, quick problem solving, and proactive network management. The report relies on authentic reviews to identify the top-performing options in the industry.
Pentagon watchdog releases report on US Secretary of War Hegseth Signal use.
US Secretary of War Hegseth Sent Yemen strike information 2-4 hours before the attack.
US Secretary of War Hegseth's personal phone use risked compromising info - watchdog.

data.title: Flatiron Energy hires Scott Schwartz as Chief Development Officer, bringing 9 GW experience from RWE Clean Energy.
data.description: In Denver, Flatiron Energy has appointed Scott Schwartz as their Chief Development Officer. Schwartz, who joins from RWE Clean Energy, held the post of Vice President of Utility-Scale Development for the East region at RWE, where he managed the development of a 9 GW portfolio comprising standalone storage, solar, and onshore wind assets. Prior to his role at RWE, Schwartz served in various leadership positions in the company and in the U.S. Navy.

data.title: NVIDIA's GB200 NVL72 boosts AI models with 10x MoE performance, setting new efficiency standards.
data.description: The GB200 NVL72 from NVIDIA has resulted in a significant 10-fold increase in performance for AI models that utilize the Mixture-of-Experts architecture. This advancement is setting a new benchmark for efficiency and scalability in the field.

data.title: Crypto market up, as BTC at $93,000 (+1%), ETH at $3,190 (+4%), BNB at $909, SOL at $143. BlackRock bullish, Polymarket US launch noted, major cryptos showed gains.
data.description: The cryptocurrency market saw slight gains, with Bitcoin (BTC) increasing by 1% to $93,000, Ethereum (ETH) soaring by 4% to $3,190, Binance Coin (BNB) and Solana (SOL) both adding 1% to reach $909 and $143, respectively. Notable performers included Zcash (ZEC) rising by 10%, Tao (TAO) by 8%, and Dash (DASH) by 6%. Major ETH holders resumed significant spot purchases after Monday's sell-offs, indicating renewed interest from institutional investors. Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong revealed partnerships with "top banks" for stablecoin, custody, and trading trials at the Dealbook Summit. BlackRock's 2026 outlook remained bullish on U.S. equities, citing AI and increased stablecoin adoption as transformative market trends. Binance launched "Binance Junior," a crypto savings account for minors with strict parental controls, while Startale, Sony's Soneium blockchain partner, introduced USDSC, a stablecoin intended for transactions on the Soneium L2 platform.
Roskomnadzor blocked SnapChat in Russia.

data.title: Blend360 wins 2025 AWS Partner Award for LATAM Sustainability and Public Sector; part of global partners team.
data.description: Blend360 was named the Sustainability Partner of the Year for LATAM and also secured the title of Public Sector Solution Provider Program Partner of the Year, achieving recognition among the array of AWS Partners globally aiding customers in fostering innovation. The announcement was made in Las Vegas on December 4, 2025.

data.title: D.A. Davidson advised Courizon Partners on acquiring Air Burners, leading in wood waste disposal globally.
data.description: D.A. Davidson, a financial advisory firm, revealed its role as the exclusive financial advisor to Courizon Partners LLC in the acquisition of Air Burners, Inc. Courizon specializes in North American middle-market industrial and consumer businesses experiencing significant transition periods. The purchase involved Air Burners, the top global provider of air curtain burner systems for sustainable disposal of wood and vegetative waste. This signifies Courizon's focus on environmentally conscious investments.

data.title: FirstService declares quarterly cash dividend of US$0.275 per Common Share, payable on Jan 7, 2026.
data.description: FirstService Corporation, a company listed on both the TSX and NASDAQ under the symbols FSV, declared a quarterly cash dividend of US$0.275 per Common Share. This dividend will be paid on January 7, 2026 to shareholders of record as of December 31, 2025. The dividend on Common Shares qualifies as an "eligible dividend" for Canadian income tax purposes.
Fed bids for 4-week bills total $276.1 mln.

data.title: Cresta Fund Management LLC hires David Altshuler as Partner & Head of Capital Formation. Wade Webber promoted to Partner.
data.description: In a press release dated December 4, 2025, Cresta Fund Management LLC revealed significant changes to its leadership team. David Altshuler has been welcomed as Partner and Head of Capital Formation, bringing his expertise to the Dallas-based private equity firm. Additionally, existing team member Wade Webber has been promoted to Partner. Cresta specializes in investments in energy infrastructure, solidifying its position in the market. This development showcases Cresta’s commitment to growth and strategic advancements in the industry.
